nasb.text: I will give You thanks in the great congregation; I will praise You among a mighty throng.

esv.text: I will thank you in the great congregation; in the mighty throng I will praise you.

cnv.text: 我要在大會中稱謝你， 我要在眾民中讚美你。

ccb.text: 我要在大会中称谢你， 在众人面前赞美你。

csbs.text: 我要在广大的会众里称谢你， 在强盛的子民中赞美你。
